sub_modules.fp_bandpass_fir_mac: Combinational binary32 FIR dot-product using the fixed 101-tap band-pass coefficient set.
sub_modules.fp_fir_sample_bank: Combinational sample-history packing helper for the FIR sample bank.
sub_modules.fp_valid_delay: Combinational valid forwarding stage for the chosen zero-extra-latency implementation.
sub_modules.fp_output_select: Combinational output data gating for invalid cycles.
